subject: 英语
source: 英语练习软件家长页导出（家长投喂）
note: 弟弟英语学习档案主线。后续每次导出追加一个 session，并据此刷新 profile_eddey 英语知识点。

sessions.topic: 房间 + 好玩的活动（rooms + fun activities）

wrong_items.q: 有很多好玩的事可以做。
wrong_items.user: There are lots to fun of things do
wrong_items.correct: There are lots of fun things to do.

wrong_items.user: I like in the swimming pool
wrong_items.correct: I like swimming in the pool.

wrong_items.q: I ___ English classes every week.（我每周上英语课）
There is a balcony on the second floor.
The balcony is on the first floor.

sessions.teacher_note: 主题：房间+好玩活动。重点薄弱：名词复数 s、地道用词(take classes / certified in skills)、发音(rooms 40% / bathroom 46%)。建议每天 8-10 分钟，外教课前再做 5 分钟冲刺。

sessions.topic: 外教课复习软件 Travel & Transport（旅行+交通·should·过去式）

wrong_items.user: You should for eight sleep hours
wrong_items.correct: You should sleep for eight hours.

wrong_items.user: I take to the school bus
wrong_items.correct: I take the bus to school.

wrong_items.q: 怎么说"我坐公交"最地道?

sessions.note: 弟弟首次用外教课复习软件,正确率 86%。真实薄弱集中在【英语语序】(by 的位置/should+动词原形/take the bus 结构,错3题)、过去式、听音判对错、地道用词(take the bus 不是 use a bus car)。发音练得勤:timetable 23 次、comfortable 16 次。
sessions.software_issue: ⚠️ preply-travel-vocabulary.html 的『同义词配对』关:配错时只记录无意义的『配错/应该匹配同含义』,且累计多条假错题,污染错因统计(本次5条同义词错应剔除)。下个版本应按具体词对记录或不计入错题。家长 6/20 指出。
sessions.next_focus: 英语句子语序(by/should/take the bus 结构)
